theme: Clean up the carry-forwards — the whiteboard is still blinding and the nameplate ghost persists
visual_observations: Code review confirms: (1) Nameplate dual-render bug STILL unfixed — Office.jsx line 1017 condition is !occ.ghost without !occ.idle, so idle workers show nameplate at desk AND wandering character. (2) max-height: 320px mobile issue is FIXED — grep returns no results, the offending line was removed. (3) Whiteboard #f0f0e8 background STILL unfixed at Office.css line 1094 — blazing white on dark mode. (4) Wandering char name size FIXED — now 0.32rem at line 669 with hover reveal. Two of four review #42 MUSTs resolved, two remaining.

ideas.title: Luna Dual-Render Bug — Nameplate Condition Missing Idle Guard (carry-forward #3)
ideas.description: Third consecutive carry-forward. Office.jsx line 1017: condition is `!occ.ghost` but needs `!occ.ghost && !occ.idle`. When a worker is idle/wandering, their name renders at the desk nameplate AND as a wandering character label. One-line fix. WHY: This has been identified for three reviews. The fix is literally adding '&& !occ.idle' to one condition.

ideas.title: Whiteboard Dark Mode — #f0f0e8 Still Burning Eyes (carry-forward #1)
ideas.description: Office.css line 1094 still has background: #f0f0e8 with no dark-mode variant. Fix: change base to #14122a, add [data-theme='light'] .office-whiteboard { background: #f0f0e8; }. Add vibe-specific border accents. WHY: The whiteboard is the most prominent wall element and it's a flashbang on dark mode.

ideas.title: Idle Desk Vacated Glyph (carry-forward #1)
ideas.description:
Companion to the nameplate fix. When occ.idle hides the nameplate, show a subtle 'away' indicator: {occ.idle &&
↪ away
}. CSS: opacity 0.3, italic, 0.28rem. WHY: Empty desk with no label looks broken — 'away' tells the right story.

ideas.title: Task Card / Sprint Card Formalization (carry-forward #1)
ideas.description: The deployed site shows a floating task card that doesn't exist in /workspace/src. Add a SprintCard component to Office.jsx that renders when workers are active. Shows task name (truncated), mini progress bar, percentage. WHY: Feature exists in production but not in source — next clean build loses it.

ideas.title: On-Fire Floor Heat Shimmer (carry-forward #1)
ideas.description: When data-vibe='on-fire', add a subtle upward-drifting orange shimmer via ::before pseudo-element on office-floor. Pure CSS, zero JSX. WHY: on-fire vibe should feel different from the floor up, not just the color scheme.

ideas.title: Office Tab Worker Count Badge (carry-forward #1)
ideas.description: Add a live worker count badge (e.g., 3/5) to the Office tab button so Dashboard viewers can see team activity at a glance without switching tabs. WHY: Eliminates unnecessary tab switches for status checks.
